Mining_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998: NSLOCTEXT("", "63B9F19849CB6EE63A92C88C1EC5FBF7", "Many objects are susceptible to Roland's Mining Laser, like the metal scrap lying around here. Interacting (LMB) with such an object begins to channel Energy from the laser into it. When the Energy reaches a critical level, it discharges in an explosion and blows apart the object. Some objects dissipate more Energy than others, and so multiple laser blasts may be required. Make sure to channel the Energy into the same location to continue to build it up!")
